description: middle beat (beat 2), with previous prose for transition bridge, full mode, no location change so setting suppressed

input.previousBeatProse: The first sentence of the prior beat sat on the page like a stone. Then a second beat sentence carried the moment forward. And a third closed the breath.

scenes.description: Drizzt sits in the corner watching the door.
He orders a drink and listens to the room.
Catti-brie joins him and they speak of the road ahead.
They finish their drinks and decide where to go next.

characters.name: Catti-brie
characters.internalConflict: loyal to her clan but drawn to the world beyond
exampleLines: Aye, ye look like ye need a drink, friend.
Where the road bends, that's where I want to go.
Don't ye dare leave me behind.

locations.name: Bryn Shander
locations.description: Largest of the Ten Towns; a walled hub of trade and rumor.
locations.sensoryDetails: tallow smoke, ale-and-fish stink, the rumble of teamster wagons
